text:
was a member of the 104th Training Corps who fought in the battle for Trost District.

Appearance

Mylius Zeramuski was of average height with light hair. He wore the typical uniform of a member of the 104th Training Corps.

Personality

Mylius appeared to be cautious, attempting to keep Eren from acting rashly during the battle for Trost.

Story

Wall Sealing arc

During the Battle of Trost District, Mylius is assigned to a middle guard squad in Trost District. Shortly after the squad's deployment, the group is attacked by an abnormal Titan, which results in the death of Thomas Wagner. This causes Eren Yeager to attack it in a rage, despite Mylius' warnings. Eren is injured, and the rest of the squad is killed in short order trying to help him.

Armin later reports Mylius' demise to the remaining members of the 104th Training Corps, saying he died valiantly in the line of duty.

Legacy

Royal Government arc

While speaking to Historia under the Reiss Chapel, Eren mentions Mylius as being among the victims he and Grisha Yeager are responsible for killing by stealing the Founding Titan.
